arts.ttl: PSG vs. Stade Brestois Probable Lineup: Who Will Luis Enrique Choose?
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain cruised to a 3-0 win over Stade Brestois in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League knockout play-off last Tuesday at Stade de Roudourou, with Ousmane Dembélé scoring twice. Unless Brest stages an incredible comeback, PSG will meet either Barcelona or Liverpool in the Round of 16. arts.ttl: Report: What Liverpool have privately informed Ibrahima Konate about his contract after claims he wants PSG move

arts.sum: With Milan Skriniar set to move to Fenerbahçe SK, Paris Saint-Germain could be in the market for a new center-back when the summer transfer window opens. Since Skriniar’s departure is permanent, PSG will need to find a replacement.
